SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.omf

Class OmfFile

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.omf.OmfFile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<OmfRecord>, Collection<OmfRecord>, List<OmfRecord>, SequencedCollection<OmfRecord>, IndirectList<OmfRecord>, Writable
public class OmfFile extends Object implements IndirectList<OmfRecord>, Writable
Represents an OMF (Object Module Format) file.

This class provides functionality to parse existing OMF files and build new ones. OMF files contain a sequence of typed records that define segments, symbols, relocations, and other object module data.

    Class

    static class 
    OmfFile.Builder
    Builder for constructing OMF files programmatically.
    static class

    Parser for reading OMF files from input streams.

    • OmfFile

      protected OmfFile(OmfFile.Parser parser) throws IOException
      Parses an OMF file from the parser input stream.
      Parameters:
      parser - the parser containing input source and configuration
      Throws:
      IOException - if parsing fails due to invalid data or I/O errors

    • getLnameByIndex

      public String getLnameByIndex(int index)
      Gets a name from the LNAMES records by its 1-based index.
      Parameters:
      index - the 1-based index
      Returns:
      the name at the specified index
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the index is invalid

    • indexOfLname

      public int indexOfLname(String name)
      Gets the 1-based index of a name in the LNAMES records.
      Parameters:
      name - the name to find
      Returns:
      the 1-based index
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the name is not defined

    • indexOfLnameBefore

      public int indexOfLnameBefore(String name, OmfRecord record)
      Gets the 1-based index of a name that appears before a specified record.
      Parameters:
      name - the name to find
      record - the context record
      Returns:
      the 1-based index
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the name is not defined before the record
